title: Remove previous build contents
close_reason: Removed previous build contents and left repository metadata for rebuild tracking

title: Rebuild digi-dx from scratch
description:
Summary: The previous digi-dx build has been removed so the project can be rebuilt from a clean repository state. This epic tracks the upcoming scratch rebuild work.

Files to modify: New project files will be created from scratch in the repository root and appropriate subdirectories.

Implementation steps:
1. Define the new project scope and architecture.
2. Scaffold the new source tree, tests, docs, and dependency metadata.
3. Add quality gates for the new implementation.
4. Commit and push each coherent rebuild milestone.
